title: Misteri di Bawah Tangga Darurat
theme: Sebuah pencarian kecil di sudut terabaikan kantor dapat mengungkap misteri tersembunyi, memicu rasa ingin tahu, dan memberikan momen petualangan tak terduga di tengah rutinitas.

cover.prompt: An abstract, slightly elevated view of an office workspace. A prominent computer monitor displays an intricate, glowing digital labyrinth of code and numbers. A subtle, anonymous human silhouette is positioned before the screen. The background features a gentle, blurred architectural repetition of an office environment, conveying a sense of ongoing cycles and daily routines. Soft, ambient illumination, perhaps mimicking a gentle dawn or late afternoon glow, bathes the scene, creating a feeling of quiet introspection.
cover.style: Cinematic photography, shallow depth of field, warm color grading, minimalist composition

meta.plan_summary: Arya, a jaded IT staff, discovers a mysterious, always-locked door under the emergency stairs of his office. He finds a key, explores a dark, forgotten passage, and uncovers an old archive room containing relics and letters from the past, finding a personal treasure that breaks the monotony of his routine.
meta.target_emotion: curiosity, excitement, wonder, light suspense, sense of discovery
